edits.request: 将工具搜索默认展示的结果数量从 8 个增加到 10 个，让用户更容易找到需要的工具，并同步更新相关测试。
Increase the pending-input preview from 3 lines to 5 lines so users can see more of a long pasted message before sending it, and update the related tests.

In aggregate_output, change the retained-byte split between stdout and stderr from giving stdout a quarter of the cap to an even half-and-half split, and update the exec_tests expectations that assume stdout_cap = cap / 4.

Increase IO_DRAIN_TIMEOUT_MS in core/src/exec.rs from 2000 to 5000 milliseconds so slow grandchild processes have more time to flush stdout/stderr before draining stops on timeout, and update any test or comment that assumes the 2s value.
Codex 执行 shell 命令时，输出太长会被截断。请把 ShellTool 模式下保留输出的字节上限提高一倍（FullBuffer 模式继续不设上限），并同步修正依赖旧上限的测试，保证行为一致。
In ExecCapturePolicy::retained_bytes_cap, double the byte cap for ShellTool captures (use EXEC_OUTPUT_MAX_BYTES * 2), keeping FullBuffer unbounded.
